metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by LiLo Labs

plugins.name: notes
plugins.description: Capture thoughts as a checklist during conversations and surface them to Claude at the right time

plugins.name: code-canvas
plugins.description: Interactive visual architecture diagrams that stay in sync as Claude works. Auto-layout, live SSE updates, comment-driven interrupts.

plugins.name: document-intake
plugins.description: Convert a folder of mixed-format documents (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, CSV, PPTX, EML, VSDX) into clean, polished, chunkable markdown — with embedded image descriptions, deterministic noise cleanup, LLM-driven semantic polish, and verification against snapshots to prove no content was lost.
